title: Soundnautica
description: A reactive music resource pack featuring the immersive soundtrack from Subnautica, dynamically played in Minecraft depending on depth, biomes, dimensions, weather, and gameplay situations.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c961644fa624ab67f73c12f6b826737ab6c8f4e.jpeg)

## 🌊 What is Soundnautica?

Soundnautica is a reactive music resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default soundtrack with ambient and immersive music inspired by the world of Subnautica.

Using the Reactive Music Mod, the soundtrack dynamically adapts to your gameplay and environment, creating a mysterious underwater survival atmosphere directly inside Minecraft.

The goal of this pack is to recreate the feeling of exploration, isolation, discovery, and deep-ocean ambience from Subnautica while keeping Minecraft relaxing and immersive.

---

## 🌌 Dynamic Music System

The music changes dynamically depending on different situations in the game.

### 🌍 Exploration

Different ambient tracks play depending on where you are:

• Ocean exploration
• Rivers and beaches
• Deep caves
• Dark underground areas
• Open landscapes
• Structures and ruins

---

## 🌧️ Environment & Weather

Music evolves depending on environmental conditions:

• Rain ambience
• Storm atmosphere
• Night exploration music
• Calm daytime ambience

---

## 🔥 Dimensions

Special tracks also play in dangerous or unique dimensions:

• Nether exploration ambience
• End dimension atmosphere
• Boss and intense situations

---

## 🎮 Gameplay Situations

Additional music can trigger during:

• Main menu
• Exploration moments
• Dangerous encounters
• Relaxing base building sessions

---

## 📦 Requirements

This resource pack requires:

[Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)

Without the mod, the pack will not work correctly.

## 📥 Installation

1. 1️⃣ Download the Reactive Music Mod
1. 2️⃣ Download NookOST
1. 3️⃣ Drag the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder

```
.minecraft/resourcepacks
```

1. 4️⃣ Launch Minecraft
1. 5️⃣ Open the Reactive Music settings

You can access it by:

Using Mod Menu

Typing the command:


```
/reactivemusic
```

---

## 🎵 Soundtrack

This pack includes music inspired by:

Subnautica and underwater ambient exploration games.

The soundtrack dynamically reacts to:

• Biomes
• Weather
• Time of day
• Underground depth
• Gameplay situations

to recreate a relaxing, immersive, and mysterious exploration atmosphere inside Minecraft.
